text.title: Design-to-Dev Handoff Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs to procedure to output for a typical instance of Design-to-Dev Handoff.

example.scenario: Handoff of checkout v3 to remote eng Anna. Spec filled (8 states, tokens, motion, a11y, edge cases). 4-min Loom names 3 gotchas (slow-network skeleton, RTL, dark-mode contrast). AC co-written: 6 criteria. 15-min sync held Friday. Eng ships in 3 days, no follow-up Qs.
example.trace: r1-four-artefact-package → r2-ac-co-written → r3-video-names-gotchas → r4-sync-or-async-decision-recorded → handoff stored
